_meta.name: HYPER-SKILLs Agent Loadouts
_meta.purpose: Declares which skills each agent MUST / MAY / MUST-NOT load. Every id is validated against skills-registry.json.
_meta.enforcement: validate_loadouts.py (pre-push gate) + agent boot-check + crew-orchestrator injection
_meta.resolution: effective set per agent = _defaults merged with the agent's own entry (required = union, forbidden = union)
_meta.status: STARTER — covers the confirmed core + brain agents; extend as the roster grows

_defaults.notes: Every agent: SACRED SIX (6 laws), FIVE WARDS (guardrails), METRICS OATH, MIRROR OATH (self-audit), THREE VOICES (comms). Optional: MERCY MESSAGE (ND error copy), REALITY ANCHOR (truth-vs-claim).

crew-orchestrator.notes: Orchestrates AND executes -> CHOICE MATRIX (decisions) + CONSENT GUARDIAN (approval gate) mandatory.

broski-bot.notes: Moderation is consent-gated (V2.4 rule: ban/kick never fully autonomous). Course rules are wrong-repo -> forbidden.

nemoclaw-agent.notes: Code-health sidecar (:8099) -> Prometheus/Grafana metrics integration (METRICS FORGE).

healer-agent.notes: Self-healing -> REALITY ANCHOR so it fixes real failures, not reported ones.

agent-factory.notes: Builds agents -> BIRTH RITE (10-point checklist) + CRADLE-TO-GRAVE (lifecycle).

agent-registry.notes: Owns the roster -> GRAND ROSTER is its source of truth.

agent-focus-tracker.notes: Brain agent (:3303). FOCUS HAWK is literally its manifest; FLOW KEEPER for anti-interrupt. Brain-repo agent -> no V2.4 rules.

agent-morning-briefing.notes: Brain agent (:3304). User-facing daily DM -> MERCY MESSAGE promoted to required.

agent-hyper-brain-core.notes: Brain memory hub (:3301) -> context retention + truth audit on recall.

agent-mcp-bridge.notes: Brain bridge (:3302) -> TOOL BELT (tools API) + PORT WARDEN (network map).

broski-pets-bridge.notes: Pets companion (:8098), user-facing -> ND-first copy required.
